narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp G (precinct in Warren County) has 794 registered voters, with 39.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
